title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at FitOn Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at FitOn Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with FitOn Holdings Services! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Jodhpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About FitOn Holdings Services:
FitOn Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Operations

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FitOn Holdings Services!
